def solve(*args):
    if len(args) < 1:
        return None
    
    url = args[0]
    
    if not isinstance(url, str) or not url.startswith("http"):
        return None
    
    # Simulated web scraping logic
    purchase_history = [
        {"order_number": "12345", "order_date": "2023-01-01"},
        {"order_number": "12346", "order_date": "2023-01-02"},
        {"order_number": "12347", "order_date": "2023-01-03"},
    ]
    
    return purchase_history
